depth_vs_bounded_differential.free_time_exponent_counterfamily: k(phi)=exp(a phi), t'=exp(-(a+2)beta)t gives common factor exp(-2(a+1)beta)
depth_vs_bounded_differential.full_frame_condition: the spatial seed before the exp(2phi) reciprocal weight must be invariant under phi translations
depth_vs_bounded_differential.normalization: L=X_max is an available global normalization using the working ruler, not a derivation of X_max's value
depth_vs_bounded_differential.pure_depth_solution: k(phi)=constant=L, hence reciprocal spatial coframe L dphi
depth_vs_bounded_differential.scope: constant k is selected only with fixed t'=exp(-2beta)t; bounded dx still fails every constant time rescaling because its defect depends on position; new field/frame mixing is outside the declared class

full_frame.bounded_action: x'=X_max tanh(phi-beta) gives XR1 and fixes +-X_max as limiting endpoints
full_frame.causal_action: conformal factor is positive, so the metric null cone is preserved
full_frame.metric_family: g=-exp(-2phi)c^2 dt^2 + exp(2phi) h_ij dz^i dz^j
full_frame.not_claimed: unique complete UDT metric, isometry, angular topology, action, or physical signal theorem
full_frame.spatial_seed_condition: h=h(y) is stationary and F_beta-invariant; arbitrary invariant depth-transverse cross terms survive

projective_position.anchor_uniqueness: unique fractional-linear chart with r=0 -> -1, r=1 -> 0, r=infinity -> +1
projective_position.composition: multiplication of reciprocal projective ratios gives xi12=(xi1+xi2)/(1+xi1 xi2)
projective_position.remaining_choice: the projective-position identification is not yet owner-locked by the current foundation

seal_and_bootstrap.absolute_seal_test: if the same physical scalar is shifted internally, Phi_abs=0 maps to -beta and the seal is not preserved
allowed_resolutions_not_selected: phi_rel is a coordinate/ray parameter distinct from Phi_abs
revise the absolute-seal or global-frame interpretation
seal_and_bootstrap.bootstrap_Xmax: X_max can be invariant if it is a scalar output of complete-solution closure
seal_and_bootstrap.c_caveat: the symbol c is unchanged and conformal null cones are preserved; its value or bootstrap origin is not derived
seal_and_bootstrap.mass_caveat: this requires a native observer-independent M_total; current complete action/source/mass definition remains open
seal_and_bootstrap.relational_depth_action: phi_rel'=phi_rel-beta so each positional observer can set local relational depth to zero

transverse_sector.equivalent_form: all spatial coframe directions carry the same exp(+phi) reciprocal weight over a phi-independent seed
surviving_intrinsic_seeds: arbitrary phi-independent q_AB and invariant cross terms

two_dimensional_conformal_counterfamily.extension: u'=-h_beta(-u), v'=h_beta(v), where h_beta is any smooth monotone one-parameter re-centering conjugated into optical y
two_dimensional_conformal_counterfamily.optical_coordinates: u=t-y, v=t+y with g2=-A(y) du dv
two_dimensional_conformal_counterfamily.remaining_gate: the reciprocal projective coframe join or full transverse structure must do the selecting
